name: 角动量
subject: physics
curriculum_points:
1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.
Relevant equation:

1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interval of time in which that displacement occurs.
Relevant equation:

1.2.B.5
Calculating average velocity or average acceleration over a very small time interval yields a value that is very close to the instantaneous velocity or instantaneous acceleration.

excerpts.text:

Calculating average velocity or average acceleration over a very small time interval yields a value that is very close to the instantaneous velocity or instantaneous acceleration.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「角动量」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.
Relevant equation:…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interva… 对理解「角动量」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
